Hi LinkedIn Developer Support,

**Where to send:**
1. **Primary:** Reply directly to the original confirmation email from `developer-support@linkedin.com` (keeps ticket history)
2. **Backup:** https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/ask/API-DEV
3. **Last resort:** LinkedIn Developer Community forum tag the official account

**Do NOT:** spam multiple channels simultaneously — pick one and wait 3 business days before trying another.
